mapper.sql: id, parent_id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, api_path, sort_num, description, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select from sys_permission
order by parent_id, sort_num, id

select distinct permission.permission_code from sys_user_role user_role inner join sys_role role on role.id = user_role.role_id and role.status = 'ACTIVE' inner join sys_role_permission role_permission on role_permission.role_id = role.id inner join sys_permission permission on permission.id = role_permission.permission_id and permission.status = 'ACTIVE' where user_role.user_id = #{userId} order by permission.permission_code
select id from sys_permission where id in #{id}
select count(1) from sys_permission where parent_id = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_permission (parent_id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, api_path, sort_num, description, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{parentId}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{apiPath}, #{sortNum}, #{description}, #{status}, now(), now())
